name: NullShift
description: Privacy-first builder labs. Dark cyberpunk static website with terminal effects, agent graphs, and interactive dashboards.
readme:
## Overview

NullShift is the central hub — a privacy-first solo builder labs static website with dark hacker/cyberpunk aesthetic. Pure HTML5 + CSS3 + Vanilla JS, zero frameworks, zero build tools.

## Features

- Matrix rain canvas animation
- Interactive terminal with easter eggs (Snake game, hidden commands)
- Agent graph visualization with force-directed layout
- Blog with client-side markdown rendering
- Achievement/badge system
- Command palette, keyboard shortcuts, theme customizer
- Service worker for offline support

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Pure HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript
- **Server**: Express.js (for Railway deployment only)
- **Hosting**: Railway
- **Design**: Dark mode only, cyberpunk aesthetic

## Pillars

- [x] Privacy — zero tracking, no analytics cookies
- [x] AI — agent dashboards and chat simulators
- [x] Blockchain — project showcases and token tools
- [x] ZK Proofs — code playground with proof examples

name: SEO Keyword Agents
description: SEO Dashboard with Next.js + FastAPI + PostgreSQL. Vietnamese UI, LLM streaming, and 4 SEO analysis modules powered by AI agents.
readme:
## Overview

SEO Keyword Agents is a full-stack SEO dashboard combining Next.js frontend with FastAPI backend and PostgreSQL. Features Vietnamese UI, real-time LLM streaming, and 4 specialized SEO analysis modules.

## Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js with Vietnamese UI
- **Backend**: FastAPI with async endpoints
- **Database**: PostgreSQL for keyword data storage
- **AI**: LLM streaming for real-time SEO analysis

## Modules

- Keyword Research Agent
- Content Optimization Agent
- Competitor Analysis Agent
- SERP Tracking Agent

## Key Features

- [x] Real-time LLM streaming responses
- [x] Vietnamese language UI
- [x] 4 SEO analysis modules
- [x] PostgreSQL data persistence
- [x] FastAPI async backend

name: P2P Escrow Marketplace
description: Decentralized P2P marketplace on BNB Smart Chain with smart contract escrow, E2E encryption, and on-chain dispute resolution.
readme:
## Overview

P2P Escrow Privacy Marketplace — a decentralized marketplace built on BNB Smart Chain with smart contract escrow, end-to-end encryption, and on-chain dispute resolution.

## Architecture

- **Smart Contracts**: Solidity escrow contracts on BNB Chain
- **Frontend**: TypeScript with Web3 integration
- **Privacy**: End-to-end encrypted messaging between buyer/seller
- **Disputes**: On-chain dispute resolution with arbitrator voting

## Key Features

- [x] Smart contract escrow system
- [x] E2E encrypted communication
- [x] On-chain dispute resolution
- [x] BNB Smart Chain deployment
- [ ] Multi-chain support

name: NullShift Guardian
description: AI-powered home safety & automation for Raspberry Pi. Fire/smoke detection, fall detection, seizure detection, and smart AC control.
readme:
## Overview

NullShift Guardian is an AI-powered home safety and automation system designed for Raspberry Pi. Uses computer vision for real-time threat detection and IoT integration for smart home control.

## Detection Modules

- **Fire/Smoke Detection**: Real-time video analysis for early fire warning
- **Fall Detection**: Pose estimation to detect falls, especially for elderly
- **Seizure Detection**: Motion pattern analysis for medical emergency alerts
- **Smart AC Control**: Temperature-based automation with learning

## Architecture

- **Hardware**: Raspberry Pi with camera module
- **Vision**: OpenCV + custom trained models
- **Alerts**: Push notifications, SMS, Telegram integration
- **Control**: GPIO for smart home device control

## Roadmap

- [x] Fire/smoke detection model
- [x] Fall detection pipeline
- [ ] Seizure detection refinement
- [ ] Smart AC learning algorithm
- [ ] Mobile app dashboard

name: NullShift Perf Agent
description: Automated cross-platform performance marketing intelligence agent. AI-driven campaign optimization and analytics.
readme:
## Overview

Automated cross-platform performance marketing intelligence agent. Uses AI to analyze, optimize, and report on marketing campaigns across multiple platforms.

## Features

- Cross-platform campaign tracking
- AI-driven budget optimization
- Automated reporting and insights
- Performance anomaly detection

## Architecture

- **Core**: Python agent framework
- **Integrations**: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads APIs
- **Intelligence**: LLM-powered analysis and recommendations

## Status

- [x] Core agent framework
- [x] Multi-platform data ingestion
- [ ] LLM analysis pipeline
- [ ] Automated optimization actions

name: Privacy DeFi Lending
description: Privacy-focused DeFi lending protocol with zero-knowledge proof verification for creditworthiness without revealing financial data.
readme:
## Overview

A privacy-focused DeFi lending protocol that uses zero-knowledge proofs to verify borrower creditworthiness without revealing their financial data on-chain.

## Architecture

- **Smart Contracts**: Solidity lending pools with ZK verifiers
- **Privacy**: ZK proofs for credit score verification
- **Collateral**: Privacy-preserving collateral management

## Key Features

- [x] Core lending smart contracts
- [ ] ZK credit verification circuits
- [ ] Privacy-preserving collateral
- [ ] Liquidation engine

name: ClawxFilm
description: AI-powered IP character video pipeline. Generate consistent character videos from scripts using AI models.
readme:
## Overview

ClawxFilm is an AI-powered IP character video pipeline. Takes scripts as input and generates consistent character videos using AI models for animation and voice synthesis.

## Pipeline

- **Script Parser**: Break down scripts into scenes and actions
- **Character Engine**: Maintain character consistency across frames
- **Video Generation**: AI-driven video synthesis
- **Voice Synthesis**: Text-to-speech with character-specific voices

## Status

- [x] Script parsing engine
- [x] Character consistency model
- [ ] Full pipeline integration
- [ ] Multi-character scenes

name: Moltiverse (LobsterPot)
description: A fun lottery game on Monad blockchain with NFT minting. Gamified blockchain experience with provably fair mechanics.
readme:
## Overview

LobsterPot is a fun lottery game built on Monad blockchain with NFT minting. Features provably fair lottery mechanics and collectible NFTs.

## Features

- On-chain lottery with verifiable randomness
- NFT minting for winners
- Monad blockchain for fast, cheap transactions
- Gamified UI with animations

## Tech Stack

- **Blockchain**: Monad
- **Frontend**: TypeScript
- **NFTs**: ERC-721 compatible

## Status

- [x] Smart contract deployment
- [x] NFT minting system
- [x] Lottery mechanics
- [x] Frontend integration

name: Telegram Notify Hub
description: Centralized notification hub for Telegram. Aggregate alerts from multiple services and deliver via Telegram bot.
readme:
## Overview

Telegram Notify Hub is a centralized notification system that aggregates alerts from multiple services and delivers them via Telegram bot. Single point of control for all notifications.

## Features

- Multi-source alert aggregation
- Customizable notification templates
- Priority-based routing
- Rate limiting and deduplication

## Architecture

- **Bot**: Python Telegram Bot
- **Webhooks**: Receive events from external services
- **Queue**: Priority-based message queue

## Status

- [x] Core bot framework
- [x] Webhook receiver
- [ ] Template engine
- [ ] Priority routing

name: PikaNad Game
description: Blockchain-powered game built with Godot Engine. Gamified experience with on-chain rewards and collectibles.
readme:
## Overview

PikaNad is a blockchain-powered game built with Godot Engine. Features gamified experience with on-chain rewards and collectible items.

## Tech Stack

- **Engine**: Godot with GDScript
- **Blockchain**: On-chain reward system
- **Assets**: Custom pixel art and animations

## Status

- [x] Core game mechanics
- [x] Character system
- [ ] Blockchain integration
- [ ] Marketplace for collectibles

name: WhamPay
description: Payment platform with iOS Swift app, TypeScript backend, and frontend. Built during hackathon for seamless mobile payments.
readme:
## Overview

WhamPay is a payment platform with native iOS app and TypeScript backend. Originally built during a hackathon for seamless mobile payment experiences.

## Architecture

- **iOS App**: Swift native app
- **Backend**: TypeScript API (WhamPayHackathonBe)
- **Frontend**: TypeScript web app (WhamPayHackathonFe)

## Repos

- WhamPay — iOS Swift app
- WhamPayHackathonFe — Web frontend
- WhamPayHackathonBe — Backend API

## Status

- [x] iOS app
- [x] Backend API
- [x] Web frontend
- [x] Hackathon submission
